question: Is the supermarket fresh produce section aisle rendered in a photorealistic style?
Is the shopping cart in the foreground rendered in a photorealistic style, specifically the metal mesh basket?
Is the customer rendered in an American comic style featuring visible halftone dot screen patterns?
Does the customer's arm visibly occlude the shopping cart handle?
Is the pineapple inside the cart rendered in a low-poly 3D style with faceted geometric shapes?
Is the paper shopping list inside the cart rendered in a realistic style?
Is the low-poly pineapple positioned on top of the realistic paper shopping list?
Are the grapes rendered in a watercolor hand-painted style with semi-transparent dripping effects?
Does the watercolor 'juice' bleed onto the realistic metal mesh basket, appearing segmented or interrupted by the wire grid sections?
Is the small bird perching on the cart handle rendered in an origami/folded paper style?
Is the origami bird partially occluded by the back of the customer's hand?
Is the convex security mirror at the end of the aisle rendered in a realistic style?
Does the reflection inside the convex mirror display the aisle in an isometric vector style?
Is the isometric vector reflection cropped and cut off by the mirror frame edge?
Are the distinct styles (photorealism, halftone comic, low-poly, watercolor, origami, isometric) clearly distinguishable from one another within the image?
